title: Supplementary Protocol to the Agreement of 26 July 1957 between the Austrian Federal Government, of the one part, and the Governments of the Member States of the European Coal and Steel Community and the High Authority of the European Coal and Steel Community of the other part, on the Introduction of Through International Railway Tariffs for the Carriage of Coal and Steel through the Territory of the Republic of Austria
subject: EUROPEAN COAL AND STEEL COMMUNITY (ECSC)
